subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast emigrated in the path of God! We bear witness to thy drawing nigh, thy turning, and thy presence before the face of the Wronged One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها المهاجر فی سبیل الله نشهد باقبالک و توجهک و حضورک امام وجه المظلوم اذ
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
